title: utricularia microcalyx
intro: Utricularia microcalyx, also known as the small bladderwort or Microcalyx bladderwort, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the bladderwort family (Lentibulariaceae). This plant contains medicinal properties, including iridoid glycosides, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Utricularia microcalyx include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Utricularia microcalyx can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine in various parts of the world.
